title: Second Fig
content:
Safe upon the solid rock the ugly houses stand:
    Come and see my shining palace built upon the sand!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edna St. Vincent Millay, titled "Second Fig", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
